channel.title: GitHub Ruby Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Ruby in GitHub

item.title: chatwoot/chatwoot
item.description: Open-source live-chat, email support, omni-channel desk. An alternative to Intercom, Zendesk, Salesforce Service Cloud etc. 🔥💬

item.title: rapid7/metasploit-framework
item.description: Metasploit Framework

item.title: Freika/dawarich
item.description: Self-hosted alternative to Google Location History (Google Maps Timeline)

item.title: solidusio/solidus
item.description: 🛒 Solidus, the open-source eCommerce framework for industry trailblazers.

item.title: rails/rails
item.description: Ruby on Rails

item.title: dependabot/dependabot-core
item.description: 🤖 Dependabot's core logic for creating update PRs.

item.title: ubicloud/ubicloud
item.description: Open source alternative to AWS. Elastic compute, block storage (non replicated), firewall and load balancer, managed Postgres, and IAM services in public beta.

item.title: opf/openproject
item.description: OpenProject is the leading open source project management software.

item.title: heartcombo/devise
item.description: Flexible authentication solution for Rails with Warden.

item.title: instructure/canvas-lms
item.description: The open LMS by Instructure, Inc.

item.title: department-of-veterans-affairs/vets-api
item.description: API powering VA.gov

item.title: Homebrew/homebrew-core
item.description: 🍻 Default formulae for the missing package manager for macOS (or Linux)

item.title: gitlabhq/gitlabhq
item.description: GitLab CE Mirror | Please open new issues in our issue tracker on GitLab.com

item.title: jekyll/jekyll
item.description: 🌐 Jekyll is a blog-aware static site generator in Ruby

item.title: discourse/discourse
item.description: A platform for community discussion. Free, open, simple.

item.title: github-linguist/linguist
item.description: Language Savant. If your repository's language is being reported incorrectly, send us a pull request!

item.title: DataDog/datadog-api-client-ruby
item.description: Ruby client for the Datadog API

item.title: huginn/huginn
item.description: Create agents that monitor and act on your behalf. Your agents are standing by!

item.title: teamcapybara/capybara
item.description: Acceptance test framework for web applications

item.title: fluent/fluentd
item.description: Fluentd: Unified Logging Layer (project under CNCF)

item.title: Homebrew/brew
item.description: 🍺 The missing package manager for macOS (or Linux)

item.title: postalserver/postal
item.description: 📮 A fully featured open source mail delivery platform for incoming & outgoing e-mail

item.title: forem/forem
item.description: For empowering community 🌱
